evidence.description: Ahmadinejad's elder son (Mehdi) married Mashaei's daughter circa 2008, making Mashaei Mehdi Ahmadinejad's father-in-law.
The president's eldest son is married to Mashaei's daughter, cementing their personal alliance.

editorial_notes: Mehdi Ahmadinejad married Mashaei's daughter c. 2008. Mashaei is Mehdi's father-in-law.
